name: Mayor Aldwin Goldenbottom
description: *A well-dressed man paces nervously behind his ornate desk, worry lines creasing his usually jovial features.*

recruitment.success_text: The Mayor looks startled. 'Me? Oh no, no! I'm needed here to coordinate the town's defenses. But I'll support your mission however I can!'

initial: Thank the gods! You look like someone who can actually DO something!
I'm Mayor Goldenbottom, and I desperately need help.
My wife and daughter... they've vanished along with several townspeople.
first_meeting: It started small - a few homeless folks disappeared, people we thought might have just... moved on.
But then my dear Martha and little Rosie vanished from our own home!
No signs of struggle, no ransom demands - they're simply gone!
post_initial: I've tried everything - town guards, hired investigators, even posted rewards!
Nothing! It's like they've vanished into thin air!
Will you help me? I can offer payment, supplies, anything you need!
quest_accepted: Bless you! I'll authorize whatever resources you need!
Talk to the tavern folks - they hear everything in this town.
The Refugee Camp, Hill Ruins, and old Swamp Church have all had... incidents recently.
return_visits: Any news about Martha and Rosie?
I've been coordinating with the town guard, but we're spread too thin.
Please, you're our best hope for bringing them home safely.
party_full: With your combined skills, you might actually succeed where others have failed.
Bring my family home, and Redstone will be forever in your debt.
